content.query:
SELECT distinct 
branchZip.[OperatingCompany]
,dma.DMA
FROM 
[EDW].[DIM_ERP_BRANCH_ZIP] branchZip
,[EDW].[DIM_BRANCH] branch
,[ODS].[MKTDATA_ZIP_CODES_DB_DELUXE_BUSINESS] zip
,[ODS].[MKTDATA_USA_TV_DMA_MAP] dma
WHERE
branchZip.[BranchID] = branch.[BranchID]
and branchZip.ZipCode = zip.ZipCode
and zip.County = dma.COUNTY
and zip.[State] = dma.STATE_AB
and zip.[PrimaryRecord] = 'P'
and len(trim(MSA_Name)) > 0
and branch.[Active] = 'True'
order BY
[OperatingCompany]
